buildspec.yml.general_idea: Upgrade the build environment to use Java 21 instead of the previous JDK version.
buildspec.yml.why_exists: The project targets JDK 21; without installing and configuring JDK 21, the build will fail to compile or run tests against the target runtime.
buildspec.yml.before:
- echo "Install helm"
- curl -fsSL -o get_helm.sh https://raw.githubusercontent.com/helm/helm/main/scripts/get-helm-3
- chmod 700 get_helm.sh
- ./get_helm.sh
- helm version
buildspec.yml.after:
- echo "Install JDK 21"
- yum install -y java-21-amazon-corretto-headless
- export JAVA_HOME=/usr/lib/jvm/java-21-amazon-corretto.x86_64

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the target Java version property from 17 to 21 to align with the JDK 21 migration.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project must compile and run on JDK 21; keeping java.version=17 may cause compiler warnings or prevent usage of JDK 21 features, though Quarkus 3.x handles the transition.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Quarkus framework version from 2.14.0.Final to 3.5.0 to support JDK 21 and modern APIs.
pom.xml.why_exists: Quarkus 2.x does not support JDK 21 as a baseline; upgrading to Quarkus 3.x is required for JDK 21 compatibility and access to reactive REST endpoints.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace legacy RESTEasy dependencies with Quarkus 3.x reactive RESTEasy Jackson extension.
pom.xml.why_exists: Quarkus 3.x deprecates/removes the classic RESTEasy JSON-B extension in favor of RESTEasy Reactive; using old artifacts causes compile errors or missing runtime classes.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update SLF4J logging API version to 2.0.6 to match Quarkus 3.x and JDK 21 ecosystem standards.
pom.xml.why_exists: SLF4J 1.7.x is incompatible with newer logging bridges and Quarkus 3.x expectations; upgrading prevents classpath conflicts and runtime logging failures.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade RestAssured version to 5.3.2 to align with JDK 21 and modern HTTP client requirements.
pom.xml.why_exists: RestAssured 4.x relies on older Apache HTTP Client versions that may not function correctly or securely on JDK 21; 5.x is required for full compatibility.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven Compiler Plugin to 3.11.0 to support JDK 21 compilation features.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older compiler plugins may not fully support JDK 21 language features or module descriptors; 3.11.0 is recommended for JDK 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven Surefire Plugin to 3.2.1 to ensure test execution compatibility with JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Surefire versions may fail to launch tests on JDK 21 due to module access restrictions or JVM argument handling changes.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven Failsafe Plugin to 3.2.1 to ensure integration test execution compatibility with JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Similar to Surefire, older Failsafe versions may encounter runtime failures on JDK 21.

src/main/docker/Dockerfile.general_idea: Switch the base image from a standard Eclipse Temurin JDK 17 image to a custom internal JDK 21 image to align with the target runtime version.
src/main/docker/Dockerfile.why_exists: The application is being migrated to Java 21; running on a Java 17 base image would result in a version mismatch or failure to utilize Java 21 features/optimizations required by the new codebase.

src/main/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.general_idea: Migrate JAX-RS and CDI annotations from javax to jakarta namespace for Jakarta EE 10+ compatibility.
src/main/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.why_exists: javax packages are removed in Jakarta EE 10+ (e.g., TomEE 10, WildFly 27+), causing ClassNotFoundException or NoClassDefFoundError at runtime, or compile errors if javax artifacts are removed from classpath.

src/main/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.general_idea: Migrate JAX-RS and CDI annotations from javax namespace to jakarta namespace for Jakarta EE 10+ compatibility.
src/main/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.why_exists: Compilation failure: classes in javax.ws.rs and javax.enterprise.context packages are removed or unavailable in Jakarta EE 10+ runtimes (e.g., Tomcat 10+, WildFly 27+) and modern JAX-RS implementations targeting Jakarta.

src/main/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.general_idea: Migrate CDI context annotations from javax to jakarta namespace.
src/main/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.why_exists: javax.enterprise.context.ApplicationScoped class not found on Jakarta EE 10+ / Quarkus 3+ runtime.

src/main/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.general_idea: M CDI context annotations from javax to jakarta namespace.
src/main/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.why_exists: javax.enterprise.context.Dependent class not found on Jakarta EE 10+ / Quarkus 3+ runtime.

src/main/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.general_idea: Migrate transactional annotation from javax to jakarta namespace.
src/main/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.why_exists: javax.transaction.Transactional class not found on Jakarta EE 10+ / Quarkus 3+ runtime.

src/test/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.general_idea: Update import path for the RestAssured test fixture to match a package restructuring in the common test library.
src/test/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.why_exists: Import statement points to a non-existent class path, causing a compilation error.

src/test/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.general_idea: Add import for the Message entity class used in the refactored test assertions.
src/test/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.why_exists: Class Message is referenced in the test body but not imported, causing a compilation error.
